_description: Data-driven friendly statements for TTS narration. Organized by trigger condition. Used by dmm_sun_utils.get_nice_statement(). Edit this file to add/remove/customize statements.

scorching_above_95: Stay hydrated out there — it's scorching today.
It's a hot one. Maybe save the outdoor run for later.
warm_85_to_95: You better bring sunscreen — it's warm out there!
Perfect pool weather if you can find one.
Don't forget the water bottle today.
pleasant_72_to_85: Beautiful day to be outside. Enjoy it!
The kind of day that makes you glad you're in LA.
Great weather for a walk today.
cool_58_to_72: Grab a light layer — it's pleasant but cool.
Nice and comfortable out there right now.
chilly_45_to_58: Grab a jacket, it's cooler than you think out there.
Layer up before you head out — it's brisk.
cold_below_45: Bundle up! It's unusually cold for LA.
Definitely a hot coffee kind of morning.

rain: Rainy day in LA — drive carefully out there.

strong_above_25: Hold onto your hat — it's seriously windy.
breezy_15_to_25: It's breezy out there — might want to skip the hairspray.

high_above_80: It's humid out there — the air feels thick today.
low_below_15: The air is bone dry — stay moisturized, LA.

unhealthy_above_150: Air quality is rough — maybe keep it indoors today.
moderate_100_to_150: Air quality is a bit iffy — sensitive folks take it easy.

extreme_above_10: UV is extreme today — sunscreen is non-negotiable!
You BETTER bring sunscreen. UV index is off the charts.
high_7_to_10: You better bring sunscreen — UV is high today!
SPF 50 kind of day. Don't skip it.

within_90_minutes: Golden hour is coming — sunset's at {next_time}.

within_60_minutes: The sun's almost up — {next_time}. New day, new data.

fallback: Have a wonderful day out there, LA.
Another day in the City of Angels. Make it count.
All systems looking good. Have a great one.
LA's doing its thing. Enjoy the ride.
Stay safe and have a nice day.
